title.en: Outside the territory of the Terrans, a group o...

content.en:
Outside the territory of the Terrans, a group of people came here.

This was a group of Dao Ancestors supporting a young man in golden armor, and this young man was one of the ten emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The identity of the emperor is very precious, whether it is potential, talent and strength, he is one of the top ten people in the genius camp of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and he must be young enough, otherwise he is not qualified to become an emperor.

And once the emperor is caught up, he will be deprived of the title of emperor.

Therefore, the emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace are trying to improve their strength and show their prestige.

Emperor Fengyang took the lead in walking out of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, challenging the true ancestors of all forces, and making a name for himself in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, if he successfully swept away the disciples of countless forces, once he returned to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he would inevitably get a great reward.

"Emperor Fengyang, the human race does not have a powerful true ancestor, the former Wanfa True Ancestor is indeed very strong, but it is a supreme true ancestor, but now he is already a Dao ancestor. Except for the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the geniuses of the human race are too weak!"

One of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors who accompanied him said.

He is one of the guards of the Emperor of Fengyang - Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor, although he is a Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he has no potential, so he was assigned to the side of the Emperor of Fengyang and served as the captain of the guard.

"Lei Yun, it's because the Terrans don't have a powerful True Ancestor that I'm going to challenge, if I sweep the Terran True Ancestor, will that Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor be very angry?

Emperor Fengyang said coldly.

But in the words, there was still a hint of jealousy.

That's right, he is jealous of Ye Tian.

Why was Ye Tian able to break into the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor, but he couldn't.

He had already reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, and there was almost no way to improve his strength, there were two choices for him in front of him, one was to impact the Dao Ancestor level, and the other was to continue to impact the Supreme True Ancestor.

But he was not reconciled!

Therefore, this time, he came out to challenge the genius true ancestors of the major sects, not only to stabilize his position, but also to gain a trace of epiphany in the battle, so as to break into the ranks of supreme true ancestors.

Although this step is difficult and difficult, there is almost no hope, but as long as there is a glimmer of hope, he has to do it.

Soon, the Emperor of Fengyang descended on the human race.

The true ancestors of the human race had naturally heard of the reputation of Emperor Fengyang, and they knew that Emperor Fengyang came from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so they sent many people to welcome Emperor Fengyang.

Terran, outside the Temple.

Many human race true ancestors and some Dao ancestors have appeared, and some Dao ancestors are relatively weak, belonging to the first and second heavenly dao ancestors, and their status is not necessarily as high as the strongest true ancestors.

The true geniuses of the human race are basically in the ranks of true ancestors, and they have been accumulating strength, and they are unwilling to easily break through into the ranks of Dao ancestors.

At this time, the Dao Ancestor who was responsible for receiving the Emperor Fengyang was the Dao Ancestor of the Terran - Qin Tian Dao Ancestor, who was also the top genius of the Human Race, plus some opportunities, and later became the top True Ancestor, but because of an accident, he fell into a forbidden place, and there was no way to contact the outside world, so he could only break into the ranks of Dao Ancestors and forcibly break through the forbidden land.

At present, he is also the strongest among the Terran Dao Ancestors, except for Ye Tian, and he is a top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, not far from breaking through the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"Qin Tian Dao Ancestor, this time I passed by the Terran territory and wanted to have a discussion with the genius of the Terran Race, no problem, right?"

Emperor Fengyang spoke.

"This ......" Qin Tian Dao Ancestor was entangled.

"Could it be that the human race is unwilling to give me this face?" Emperor Fengyang pretended to be angry.

"Naturally not!" Qin Tian Dao Ancestor hurriedly explained: "It's just that our Terran True Ancestor is not the opponent of the Fengyang Emperor, so this kind of competition is meaningless!"

"In this way, I will suppress the cultivation strength to compete with the geniuses of your human race, if they can hurt me in the slightest, I will give that true ancestor a thousand Dao art inheritance, how about it?"

"What, the !! of the Thousand Dao Inheritance Technique"

Not to mention that the True Ancestors were moved, even the Qin Heavenly Dao Ancestors were moved.

How precious is the inheritance of the Thousand Dao Arts, the human race is very rare!

Ye Tian was able to cultivate a lot of Middle Thousand Dao Techniques and even Great Thousand Dao Techniques, which came from the Black Wind Mountain, and those Dao Technique inheritances were not allowed to be passed on to others.

For such a long time, Ye Tian had also killed many True Ancestors and even Dao Ancestors, but those Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors had almost no Dao Inheritance, and even if there were, it was only a small Thousand Dao Inheritance.

Therefore, in the treasure house of the inheritance of the human race temple, there are many small thousand dao inheritances, but the middle thousand dao inheritance is very rare, and there are only a dozen or so gates.

In addition, the inheritance of the Middle Thousand Dao Technique is one less than one, and only by cultivating that Middle Thousand Dao Technique to the level of Dacheng or above can the inheritance be created.

But Ye Tian had not cultivated the inheritance of the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, so he had no way to create an inheritance, and the powerhouses of the human race did not dare to trouble Ye Tian to create an inheritance.

Therefore, the inheritance of the middle thousand dao techniques of the human race is one less than one inheritance, and if there is no great merit, there is almost no way to obtain a middle thousand dao inheritance.

Qin Tian Dao Ancestor himself had only been given one Middle Thousand Dao Technique at present, so he also wanted more Middle Thousand Dao Techniques.

"Sure enough, it is a human race with a weak background, and just one thousand Dao art inheritance makes them show greedy and excited eyes!"

Emperor Fengyang secretly despised Dao.

Of course, the inheritance value of the Middle Thousand Dao Technique is still very precious, and he will not give it to others casually, so he just lets the true ancestors of the human race learn from him, he doesn't think that these true ancestors can hurt him.

Therefore, the human race didn't want to obtain his Middle Thousand Dao Technique inheritance at all.

"Okay, our Terran agreed!"

Qin Tian Dao Ancestor agreed.

Soon.

One genius true ancestor after another of the Terran Race came from all over the Terran territory, and every genius true ancestor who came had reached the level of a top true ancestor, which was a very incredible thing in the past.

In the past, there were only a few top true ancestors in the powerful Void Heaven True Kingdom, but now there are dozens of top true ancestors of the human race.

In the battle ring outside the temple.

Emperor Fengyang let a celebrity genius go up, and behind his hands, he only showed a part of his strength, and easily defeated one top true ancestor after another.

Rumble!

Another top true ancestor was severely injured by the Fengyang Emperor's finger and withdrew.

"The human race doesn't have a Supreme True Ancestor, your Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor used to be a Supreme True Ancestor, and the Human Race is also a powerful racial force, so it doesn't even have the Supreme True Ancestor, right?" Emperor Fengyang sneered.

Qin Tian Dao Ancestor was also a little annoyed, he could see that Emperor Fengyang was here to deliberately provoke the human race.

It's not that the human race doesn't have the strongest true ancestor, even the invincible true ancestor has it.

For example, Xiao Yue, the wife of the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, and her sister Ye Yu, they are all invincible True Ancestors, but it is impossible for them to make a move, and they are not qualified to mobilize the family members of the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws to make a move.

In addition, there are also Supreme True Ancestors among the Nine Poles Legion, but the Supreme True Ancestor of the Nine Extremes Legion has been cultivating in the Nine Extremes Space for a long time.

In addition to them, there is another place where the Terran has the strongest True Ancestor, that is, the Terran Guardians, who belong to the Temple, they are geniuses cultivated by Ye Tian himself, and they have been guarding the depths of the Terran Temple for a long time.

I'm usually cultivating, and I'll only go out when a mission appears!

"Let the Templars do the work!"

Qin Tianfang went to invite the guardian of the temple.

The Terrans can be defeated, but they must not be ridiculed.
